title: helichrysum onivense
intro: Helichrysum onivense, a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, is also known as the mountain zephyr. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits associated with Helichrysum onivense include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. The plant's essential oil can be obtained through steam distillation and is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and topical creams.
